prompt:
An open 5 gallon bucket with small ventilation holes near the rim shows alternating layers of kitchen scraps and shredded paper. A thin brown cap sits on top, with a gloved hand holding a scoop ready to add more browns. Nearby are a small bowl of vegetable peels and a stack of dry leaves, all on a tidy patio.

The solarpunk scene is softly lit, with planters and a compact sensor or solar tag in the background. The 512×512 photorealistic image centers the layered compost in the bucket; no brand logos or readable text are visible, and no faces appear.
